allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix: restore correct ABO analysis logic from original version *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: resolve import and reference errors for RHD analysis compatibility *)
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('main.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('utils/rhd_analyzer.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; print\(sys.executable\); from Bio import SeqIO; print\('biopython ok'\)")

PowerShell(python -c "from utils.fy_analyzer import FYAnalyzer, FY_DIAGNOSTIC_SNPS; a = FYAnalyzer\(\); print\('Loaded:', a.is_loaded\(\), '| kind:', a.reference_kind, '| ref_len:', len\(a.reference_seq\), '| cds_start_genomic:', a.cds_start_genomic, '| exons:', len\(a.exon_map\)\); print\(\); print\('SNP positions:'\); [print\(f'  {n}: ref_index =', a._position_to_ref_index\(s\), '-> base =', a.reference_seq[a._position_to_ref_index\(s\)] if a._position_to_ref_index\(s\) is not None else None, '\(expected', s['ref_base'], '\)'\) for n, s in FY_DIAGNOSTIC_SNPS.items\(\)]")

PowerShell(python -c "from Bio import SeqIO; r = SeqIO.read\(r'C:/Users/ExPertComputer/Desktop/ABO_streamlit_version/utils/data/fy_referance.gb', 'genbank'\); [print\(f.type, f.location, getattr\(f.location, 'strand', '?'\), f.qualifiers.get\('number', f.qualifiers.get\('gene', ['']\)\)[0]\) for f in r.features if f.type in \('CDS', 'exon', 'gene', 'mRNA'\)]")

PowerShell(python -c "from utils.fy_analyzer import FYAnalyzer, FY_DIAGNOSTIC_SNPS; a = FYAnalyzer\(\); print\('cds_start:', a.cds_start_genomic, '| exons:', a.exon_map\); print\(\); [print\(f'{n:15s}: idx={a._position_to_ref_index\(s\)}, base={a.reference_seq[a._position_to_ref_index\(s\)] if a._position_to_ref_index\(s\) is not None else None!r}, expected ref={s[chr\(39\)+chr\(114\)+chr\(101\)+chr\(102\)+chr\(95\)+chr\(98\)+chr\(97\)+chr\(115\)+chr\(101\)+chr\(39\)]!r}'\) for n, s in FY_DIAGNOSTIC_SNPS.items\(\)]")

PowerShell(python -c "from Bio import SeqIO; r = SeqIO.read\(r'C:/Users/ExPertComputer/Desktop/ABO_streamlit_version/utils/data/jk_referance.gb', 'genbank'\); seen=set\(\); [seen.add\(f.qualifiers.get\('gene', ['']\)[0]\) for f in r.features if f.type=='gene']; print\('Genes in record:', sorted\(seen\)\); print\(\); [print\(f.type, f.location, getattr\(f.location, 'strand', '?'\), f.qualifiers.get\('number', f.qualifiers.get\('gene', ['']\)\)[0]\) for f in r.features if f.type in \('gene','CDS','mRNA'\) or \(f.type=='exon' and len\(seen\)<=2\)][:20]")

PowerShell(python -c "from utils.bloodgroup.router import route_filename; tests = ['TSN20251010-010-00025_KEL56-NP_test.ab1', 'TSN20251113-010-00152_RHCE45-1_test.fasta', 'MIA234-1_amplicon.fasta', 'FY12-NP.fasta', 'JK78-1.fasta', 'JK89-NP.fasta', 'DI1819-NP.fasta', 'RHD1-NP.fasta', 'RHD456-1.fasta', 'ABO_exon7.fasta', 'random_unknown.fasta', 'FUT1_sample.fasta']; print\('Filename routing test:'\); [print\(f'  {fn!r:60} -> {route_filename\(fn\)}'\) for fn in tests]")
